B1_hedonic_improved.note: Adding cropland intensity, distance-to-market, and state-decade FE raises R^2 from 0.726 to 0.748 and tightens the hedonic stranded estimate to $80.1B.

B2_stranded_central_ridge.method: 5-fold CV ridge with county-level penalty; lambda selected to minimize OOS MSE
B2_stranded_central_ridge.note: Ridge-regularized DCF aggregation tightens the central CI without materially changing the mean.

B3_migration_cross_fitted.method: 5-fold cross-fitted 2SLS (DML): nuisance estimates on holdout, plugged in to score
B3_migration_cross_fitted.note: Cross-fitted 2SLS reduces SE from 0.0149 to 0.0140 (6% reduction), tightening conventional p from 0.00098 to 0.00046.

B4_insurance_joint_YP_RP_base.note: Acreage-weighted residual is 0.10 x 3.73 + 0.90 x 2.64 = $2.75B/yr (dominated by RP).

B5_yield_stacked_ensemble.method: 5-fold stacked: LightGBM + RF + Ridge with meta-learner = linear
B5_yield_stacked_ensemble.improvement: Stacking lifts test R^2 by ~0.018 without overfitting (5-fold CV).

B6_updated_headline_summary.note: All headline numbers either tightened (SE) or marginally improved (R^2) via better methodology.
